title: Entry-Level Investment Banker at Bandhan Bank Advisory Limited

jsonLd.title: Entry-Level Investment Banker at Bandhan Bank Advisory Limited
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Bandhan Bank Advisory Limited! We are hiring a Investment Banker for our Bengaluru team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Bandhan Bank Advisory Limited:
Bandhan Bank Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Power BI

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Referral bonus program
• Professional development and training programs
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Bengaluru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Bandhan Bank Advisory Limited!
